text.title: Tech Debt Sprint Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the debt visible (measurable: lint count, coverage %, build time)?

conclusion.verdict: First install metrics; sprint cannot run blind.

branch.question: Are two contiguous weeks of capacity available with no feature commit?
Is a single named owner accountable for the artefact?

conclusion.verdict: Block; require named owner before starting.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
